mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(tree.TREE_CD) AS id , COALESCE(TRIM(tree.UPPER_TREE_CD), '#') AS parent , tree.TREE_NM AS text , CAST(tree.TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level" , CASE WHEN tree.UPPER_TREE_CD IS NULL THEN 'root' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE child WHERE child.UPPER_TREE_CD = tree.TREE_CD AND COALESCE(child.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y') THEN 'group' ELSE 'item' END AS "type" , tree.SORT_ORDER AS sort , COALESCE(tree.USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn , '' AS filterType , tree.TREE_NM AS filterValue , '' AS drawingNoPrefix , '' AS distributeTypeCd FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE tree WHERE COALESCE(tree.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY COALESCE(TRIM(tree.UPPER_TREE_CD), '#') , CAST(tree.TREE_DEPTH AS INTEGER) , COALESCE(tree.SORT_ORDER, 999999) , tree.TREE_NM

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM ( SELECT A1.* FROM ( SELECT info.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD AS businessTypeCd,
info.BUSINESS_PHASE AS bussinessTypeNm, info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD AS distributeTypeCd, -- FN_GET_CD_NM('distributeTypeCd', info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, 'ko') AS distributeTypeNm, info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_NAME AS distributeTypeNm, info.DRAWING_NO AS drawingNo, info.DRAWING_NM AS drawingNm, info.REV_NO AS revNo, info.CUSTOMER_REVISION AS customerRevision, info.CURRENT_PAGE_NO AS currentPageNo, info.TOTAL_PAGE_NO AS totalPageNo, info.INSERT_UID AS insertUid, info.OBJECT_ID AS objectId, insertUser.USER_NM AS insertUserNm, updateUser.USER_NM AS updateUserNm, info.INSERT_DEPT_NM AS insertDeptNm, info.STD_GAPP_DT AS stdGappDt, info.CHANGE_GAPP_DT AS changeGappDt, info.ECN_NO AS ecnNo, ecnInsert.USER_NM AS ecnUserNm, '' AS companyNm, purchaser.USER_NM AS purchaserUserNm, info.PURCHASER_UID AS purchaserUid, info.BUSINESS_AREA_CD AS businessAreaCd, FN_GET_CD_NM('businessAreaCdAll', info.BUSINESS_AREA_CD, 'ko') AS businessAreaNm, info.PROTECT_YN AS protectYn, info.PROTECT_YN AS protectYnView, info.UPDATE_DT AS updateDt, info.INSERT_DT AS insertDt, info.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, info.INTERFACE_DT AS interfaceDt, '' AS companyCd, info.PRODUCT_CD AS productCd, COALESCE(info.PRODUCT_CD, '') AS productNm, 1 AS fileNo, info.FILE_NM AS fileNm, info.FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath, info.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileViewNm, info.ORG_FILE_NM AS orgFileNm, info.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, info.ECN_TITLE AS ecnTitle, info.ECN_VENDOR_USER AS ecnVendorUser, info.VALID_TYPE AS validType, info.DISTRIBUTION_POINT AS distributionPoint, info.approvaldate AS approvalDate, info.approver AS approver, COALESCE(info.PROCESSING_STATUS, '') AS processingStatus, CASE WHEN info.status = '승인완료' THEN '승인완료' WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(info.approver), ''), '') <> '' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(info.approver, ' ', ''), ',') AS ap(token) WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(ap.token), ''), '') <> '' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') AS au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = ap.token ) ) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(info.reviewerUser), ''), '') <> '' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(info.reviewerUser, ' ', ''), ',') AS rv(token) WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rv.token), ''), '') <> '' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') AS au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = rv.token ) ) THEN '승인완료' ELSE '승인진행중' END AS status, info.coPublisher AS coPublisher, info.reviewerUser AS reviewerUser, '' AS checkSum, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY info.DRAWING_NO ORDER BY COALESCE(info.CREATE_DATE, info.INSERT_DT) DESC, info.INSERT_DT DESC ) AS rn FROM DOCS_DRAWING info LEFT JOIN DOCS_USER insertUser ON info.INSERT_UID = insertUser.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DOCS_USER updateUser ON info.UPDATE_UID = updateUser.USER_ID
LEFT JOIN DOCS_USER purchaser ON purchaser.USER_ID = info.PURCHASER_UID LEFT JOIN DOCS_USER ecnInsert ON ecnInsert.USER_ID = info.ecn_insert_uid WHERE 1=1
AND info.DELETED_YN = 'N'
AND info.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD = #{businessTypeCd}
AND info.BUSINESS_AREA_CD LIKE '%' || #{businessAreaCd} || '%'
AND info.DRAWING_NO = UPPER(TRIM(#{drawingNo}))
AND info.DRAWING_NO LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{drawingNo})) || '%'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_DRAWING_TREE docTree , DOCS_DRAWING_TREE selectedTree WHERE TRIM(docTree.TREE_CD) = TRIM(info.TREE_CD) AND TRIM(selectedTree.TREE_CD) = TRIM(#{drawingTreeCd}) AND docTree.TREE_PATH LIKE selectedTree.TREE_PATH || '%' )
AND info.DRAWING_NM LIKE '%' || #{drawingNm} || '%'
AND info.PURCHASER_UID = #{purchaserUid}
AND ( info.FILE_TYPE = #{distributeTypeCd} OR info.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD = #{distributeTypeCd} )
AND info.ECN_NO LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{ecnNo})) || '%'
AND 1=1
AND info.PRODUCT_CD = #{productCd}
AND info.INSERT_UID = #{insertUid}
AND info.VALID_TYPE IS NULL
AND info.VALID_TYPE = 'N'
AND info.INTERFACE_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{interfaceStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{interfaceEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1' DAY
-- AND DECODE(LENGTH(info.REV_NO),1,info.REV_NO||'Z',info.REV_NO) = ( AND DECODE(LENGTH(info.CUSTOMER_REVISION),1,info.CUSTOMER_REVISION||'Z',info.CUSTOMER_REVISION) = ( SELECT MAX(DECODE(LENGTH(sub_info.CUSTOMER_REVISION),1,sub_info.CUSTOMER_REVISION||'Z',sub_info.CUSTOMER_REVISION)) FROM DOCS_DRAWING sub_info WHERE sub_info.DRAWING_NO = info.DRAWING_NO AND sub_info.CURRENT_PAGE_NO = info.current_page_no )
AND (
(DRAWING_NO LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{drawingInfo.drawingNo})) || '%')
)
AND (
(DRAWING_NO = UPPER(TRIM(#{drawingInfo.drawingNo})))
)
) A1
WHERE rn = 1
) B1
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(CN_SERIAL AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1 AS cnSerial FROM DOCS_DRAWING
INSERT INTO DOCS_DRAWING ( OBJECT_ID, CN_SERIAL, INSERT_DT, CREATE_DATE, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, DRAWING_TYPE, DRAWING_NO, TREE_CD, DRAWING_NM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, FILE_TYPE, FILE_PATH_NM, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, PROCESSING_STATUS, PROTECT_YN, DISTRIBUTION_POINT, approvaldate, approver, status, coPublisher, reviewerUser, INSERT_USER_NM, CURRENT_PAGE_NO, TOTAL_PAGE_NO, REV_NO, STATUS_CD ) VALUES ( #{objectId}, CAST(#{cnSerial} AS INTEGER), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{sessionUser.businessAreaCd}, #{businessTypeCd}, #{drawingType}, #{drawingNo}, #{treeCd}, #{fileNm}, #{distributeTypeCd}, #{fileType}, #{filePath}, #{orgFileNm}, #{fileNm}, #{fileSize}, 'PROCESSING', #{protectYn}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{distributionPoint}, ''), #{sessionUser.deptNm}), #{approvalDate}, #{approver}, #{status}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{coPublisher}, ''), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), #{sessionUser.username})), #{reviewerUser}, #{sessionUser.userNm}, #{currentPageNo}, #{totalPageNo}, #{revNo}, #{statusCd} )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(REV_NO, '') FROM DOCS_DRAWING WHERE DRAWING_NO = #{drawingNo} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_DRAWING SET DELETED_YN = 'Y' WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT OBJECT_ID AS objectId, DRAWING_NO AS drawingNo, DRAWING_NM AS drawingNm, REV_NO AS revNo, FILE_NM AS fileNm, ORG_FILE_NM AS orgFileNm, FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD AS distributeTypeCd, FILE_TYPE AS fileType, COALESCE(APPROVER, '') AS approver, COALESCE(REVIEWERUSER, '') AS reviewerUser, COALESCE(STATUS, '') AS status, COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, '') AS approvedUsers, COALESCE(INSERT_UID, '') AS insertUid, COALESCE(INSERT_USER_NM, '') AS insertUserNm, COALESCE(COPUBLISHER, '') AS coPublisher, COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') AS deletedYn, TO_CHAR(INSERT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS insertDt FROM DOCS_DRAWING WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_DRAWING SET APPROVED_USERS = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, ''), ',') AS au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = split_part(#{approvedUser}, '|', 1) ) THEN COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, '') WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(APPROVED_USERS), ''), '') = '' THEN #{approvedUser} ELSE COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, '') || ',' || #{approvedUser} END, STATUS = CASE WHEN #{isFinal} = 'Y' THEN '승인완료' ELSE '승인진행중' END WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DOCS_DISTRIBUTION_APPROVAL_DETAIL ( OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_TYPE, APPROVAL_ROLE, APPROVAL_ORDER, USER_NM, USER_ID, APPROVAL_STATUS, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{objectId}, #{objectType}, #{approvalRole}, CAST(#{approvalOrder} AS INTEGER), #{userNm}, #{userId}, 'WAIT', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_TYPE, APPROVAL_ROLE, APPROVAL_ORDER) DO UPDATE SET USER_NM = EXCLUDED.USER_NM, USER_ID = EXCLUDED.USER_ID, APPROVAL_STATUS = CASE WHEN DOCS_DISTRIBUTION_APPROVAL_DETAIL.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'APPROVAL' THEN 'APPROVAL' ELSE 'WAIT' END, UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", OBJECT_TYPE AS "objectType", APPROVAL_ROLE AS "approvalRole", APPROVAL_ORDER AS "approvalOrder", USER_NM AS "userNm", COALESCE(USER_ID, '') AS "userId", COALESCE(APPROVAL_STATUS, 'WAIT') AS "approvalStatus", COALESCE(TO_CHAR(APPROVAL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '') AS "approvalDt" FROM DOCS_DISTRIBUTION_APPROVAL_DETAIL WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND OBJECT_TYPE = #{objectType} ORDER BY CASE APPROVAL_ROLE WHEN 'REVIEWER' THEN 1 WHEN 'APPROVER' THEN 2 ELSE 9 END, APPROVAL_ORDER
SELECT OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", APPROVER_ID AS "approverId", COALESCE(COMMENT_TXT, '') AS "comment" FROM DOCS_DRAWING_APPROVAL_COMMENT WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO DOCS_DRAWING_APPROVAL_COMMENT ( OBJECT_ID, APPROVER_ID, COMMENT_TXT, UPDATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{objectId}, #{approverId}, #{comment}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (OBJECT_ID, APPROVER_ID) DO UPDATE SET COMMENT_TXT = EXCLUDED.COMMENT_TXT, UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", DRAWING_NO AS "drawingNo", 1 AS "fileNo", ORG_FILE_NM AS "orgFileNm", FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", COALESCE(PROCESSING_STATUS, '') AS "processingStatus", FILE_PATH_NM AS "filePath" FROM DOCS_DRAWING WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", PARENT_OBJECT_ID AS "parentObjectId", FILE_NO AS "fileNo", ORG_FILE_NM AS "orgFileNm", FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", FILE_PATH_NM AS "filePath" FROM DOCS_DRAWING_SUB_FILE WHERE PARENT_OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY CAST(FILE_NO AS INTEGER)

SELECT OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", '1' AS "fileNo", ORG_FILE_NM AS "orgFileNm", FILE_PATH_NM AS "filePath" FROM DOCS_DRAWING WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'
AND #{fileNo} = '1'
UNION ALL SELECT OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", CAST(FILE_NO AS TEXT) AS "fileNo", ORG_FILE_NM AS "orgFileNm", FILE_PATH_NM AS "filePath" FROM DOCS_DRAWING_SUB_FILE WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y'
AND CAST(FILE_NO AS TEXT) = #{fileNo}
LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(FILE_NO), 0) + 1 FROM DOCS_DRAWING_SUB_FILE WHERE PARENT_OBJECT_ID = #{parentObjectId}
INSERT INTO DOCS_DRAWING_SUB_FILE ( OBJECT_ID, PARENT_OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH_NM, FILE_SIZE, USE_YN, INSERT_UID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_UID, UPDATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{objectId}, #{parentObjectId}, CAST(#{fileNo} AS INTEGER), #{orgFileNm}, #{filePath}, CAST(#{fileSize} AS BIGINT), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), #{sessionUser.username}), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_DRAWING SET FILE_PATH_NM = #{filePath}, FILE_SIZE = #{fileSize}, PROCESSING_STATUS = 'DONE', UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'
UPDATE DOCS_DRAWING SET PROCESSING_STATUS = #{processingStatus}, UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.select:
SELECT u.USER_NM AS "userName", COALESCE(p.POSITION_NM, '') AS "positionName" FROM DOCS_USER u LEFT JOIN DOCS_POSITION p ON p.POSITION_CD = u.POSITION_CD WHERE u.USER_NM IN
#{name}
